CheckTitle: Okta Smart Card authenticator is active
Description: **Okta Smart Card authentication** should be configured and active when certificate-based authentication is required by the STIG.
Risk: **Missing Smart Card authentication** prevents users from satisfying mandated certificate-based authentication and can force weaker fallback authentication paths.

Code.Other: Security > Authenticators: add or activate the Smart Card IdP authenticator.

Recommendation.Text: **Configure and activate the Smart Card IdP authenticator** so certificate-based authentication is available for users and apps that require it.
